markdown:
#  Invoice Administrator Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  Release Holds 
### What tool are you using?
Depending on your role and permissions settings, you can navigate to a subcontractor invoice from one of these tools:
**I am using the Payments tool.**
[Payment Admins](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/authorize-payment-admins), [Payment Disbursers](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/add-payments-disbursers), and users with 'Admin' level permissions on the Payments tool can use these steps to create, edit, view, and release Invoice or Vendor holds on subcontractor invoices. To learn more, see [What permissions do you need to manage holds on subcontractor invoices?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-a-manual-hold-on-a-subcontractor-invoice)
  1. Navigate to the Company level **Payments** tool.
  2. Click the **Subcontractor Invoices** tab. This tab is active by default.
  3. Locate the invoice for the hold.
  4. Choose one of these options:
     * Click the information icon to open the Payment Requirements panel. 
     * Click the **Invoice #** link to open the invoice in the Project level **Commitments** tool. Then click the **Payment Requirements** tab.
  5. Under **Payment Requirements** , click the **Holds** tab.


**I am using the Commitments tool.**
[Payment Admins](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/authorize-payment-admins) and [Payment Disbursers](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/add-payments-disbursers) can create, edit, view, and release Invoice or Vendor holds on subcontractor invoices from the Commitments tool. To learn more, see [What permissions do you need to manage holds on subcontractor invoices?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-a-manual-hold-on-a-subcontractor-invoice)
#####  Note
Users granted only [Invoice administrator](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/add-invoice-administrators) permissions are limited to creating, editing, and releasing _Invoice Holds_. They are limited to only viewing _Vendor Holds_ on subcontractor invoices using a project's Commitments or Invoicing tool.
  1. Navigate to the Project level **Commitments** tool.
  2. Under the **Contracts** tab, locate the contract in the table. Then, click the **Number** link to open it.
  3. In the contract, click the **Invoices** tab.
  4. Locate the invoice in the **Invoices (Requisitions)** table. Then, click the **Invoice #** link to open it.
  5. In the invoice, click the **Holds** tab.


**I am using the Invoicing tool.**
[Payment Admins](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/authorize-payment-admins) and [Payment Disbursers](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/add-payments-disbursers) can create, edit, view, and release Invoice or Vendor holds on subcontractor invoices from the Invoicing tool. To learn more, see [What permissions do you need to manage holds on subcontractor invoices?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-a-manual-hold-on-a-subcontractor-invoice)
#####  Note
Users granted only [Invoice administrator](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/add-invoice-administrators) permissions are limited to creating, editing, and releasing _Invoice Holds_. They are limited to only viewing _Vendor Holds_ on subcontractor invoices using a project's Commitments or Invoicing tool.
  1. Navigate to the Project level **Invoicing** tool.
  2. Click the **Subcontractor** tab, locate the invoice in the table.
  3. Click the **Invoice #** link to open it.
  4. Under **Payment Requirements** , click the **Holds** tab.


  1. In the **Holds** tab, Locate the hold to release. 
#####  Tips
     * **Not sure which hold to release?** To view details about each manual hold, click the BLUE arrow to expand the hold details and view any attachments. You can alternatively click the **Edit** button. To learn more, see [Edit a Manual Hold on an Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/edit-holds).
     * **Can't release a vendor hold?** You must be a Payments Admin or Payments Disburser to release a vendor hold.
  2. Click the **Release** button. ![Release Manual Hold](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1dbd8ed8af49168c6e06abb33acafc9f/16f9dad0ee74599060c17973275f2414/release-manual-hold.png?fm=webp) Procore releases the hold from the selected invoice. This action is logged in the invoice's Change History tab.


[ ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/edit-holds/)
[ Configure Requirements ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/configure-requirements/)
title: Invoice Administrator Guide - Release Holds
description: This guide shows users with invoice administrators how to manage Procore Pay features with the Invoice Management tools in Procore. | Release Holds
